{{Quote|If we wait until the fighters are all engaged, yes, then the deception will be harder to recognize. But what's the point?|Ya Sethes to Wedge Antilles|<ref name="X-Wing: SOA" />}}
'''ya Sethes''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Adumari]] who served as a [[General/Legends|general]] in the [[Yedagon Confederacy]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]]. She assisted [[Red Flight]]—a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] veteran [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] group—in planning strategies leading up to the [[Adumari Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' {{1st}}
